name: @omadia/knowledge-graph-inmemory
description: In-memory KnowledgeGraph provider plugin for the byte5 Harness — provides 'knowledgeGraph@1' + 'entityRefBus@1'. Dev-only / test fallback (no persistence, no embeddings, no Postgres). Operator picks this OR the Neon-backed sibling plugin in the RequiresWizard. S+11-2a: InMemoryKnowledgeGraph implementation moved here from @omadia/knowledge-graph; the old package now imports it transitively. Capability ownership flips in S+11-2b once the manifest declares provides:.
